en: Oh, wow.
Dude, these look great.
Yeah, we should post that.
What's up, my dude? What's up, dude?
Oh, my God. Oh, no. What happened?
Oh, sorry I'm late.
Got blown by the subway.
Damn, you see a train.
How y'all doing?
No, dude, your face. Did you get Botox?
ko: 아니, 야, 니 얼굴. 보톡스 맞았어?

en: Oh, you guys can tell? Yes.
Yeah, I just got a little touch-up.
What? So, this was intentional,
not an accident? Yeah, I figured we're going to be on camera a little more.
ko: 사고가 아니라? 응, 카메라에 더 나올 테니까.

en: I might as well look my best.
Ben, you know I love you.
ko: Ben, 내가 널 사랑하는 거 알지.

en: Love you, too. You look like you drowned.
ko: 나도 사랑해. 너 물에 빠진 것 같아.

en: I feel like I'm at your wake. You look embalmed.
ko: 장례식에 온 것 같아. 방부 처리한 것 같아.

en: I asked for the chalamet.
Is that coming through? No. No. I like it, man.
ko: 그렇게 보여? 아니. 아니. 나는 마음에 들어.

en: I paid top dollar for this thing.
How much? $150. Ben, that's not enough.
Not enough? For full-face Botox?
That sucks. I wish there was an undo button for this thing.
Your face isn't even moving when you laugh, dude.
ko: 야, 웃을 때 얼굴이 안 움직여.

en: This is so bad. I'm sorry, what did you do?
ko: 이건 진짜 심각하다. 미안한데, 너는 뭐 했어?

en: Oh, my God. What is with your fingers?
Oh, yeah, I got some work done myself.
ko: 아, 응, 나도 좀 시술 받았어.

en: You got longer fingers?
Oh, my God. We are not making this about my fingers.
ko: 세상에. 내 손가락 얘기는 안 해.

en: Wait, you extended them?
You know how many YouTube comments there were about how short they were before?
ko: 예전에 손가락 짧다고 유튜브 댓글이 얼마나 달렸는지 알아?

en: Well, now you look like the Babadook. Wow, Martin. How about you go, shh?
ko: 이제 바바둑 같아 보여. 와, Martin. 좀 조용히 하지?

en: Don't touch my mouth.
No. Wow. You look like Pan's Labyrinth.
ko: 아니. 와. 판의 미로 같아 보여.

en: Do I? Do this. That's Pan. That's Pan.
ko: 그래? 이거 해봐. 그게 판이야. 그게 판이야.

en: Oh, yeah.
Well, yeah, sure, fine, but these fingers rock.
ko: 그래, 좋아, 인정, 근데 이 손가락 끝내줘.

en: I feel more confident. I play guitar easier.
ko: 자신감이 생겨. 기타도 더 쉽게 치고.

en: I can do cool stuff like West Side.
ko: 웨스트사이드 같은 멋진 것도 할 수 있어.

en: I got Botox. I look good.
You know what? Should I get some work done on my face?
No, you look great. Oh, you don't need it.
I know. I'm talking about my second face. Ew!
ko: 알아. 두 번째 얼굴 얘기야. 으악!

en: What the hell? What? What is that?
I know, I know. He needs a nose job.
No, what the hell is it? Does it talk?
Oh, he used to, but then I think he died.
ko: 아, 예전에는 했는데, 죽은 것 같아.

en: Oh! Okay, this is so toxic.
Can we all agree that we're beautiful on the inside?
ko: 우리 다 속은 아름답다는 거에 동의할 수 있어?

en: I guess so. Yeah.
I agree. Who said that?
It was me.
You guys are beautiful. Oh!
